description: Leartech preset for Go services. Layer on top of default.json — adds groups for the leartech-go-runtime base image and internal Go libraries.

packageRules.description: Auto-merge leartech-go-runtime image bumps — patch/minor cadence, internal lib, low risk.
Auto-merge leartech-go-common + generated leartech-go-packages/* as soon as they land. 'at any time' overrides default Monday-only schedule because internal libs may need to flow within hours.
